summary: Comprehensive QA audit of Login page for CreatorStudio AI. All 13 test scenarios passed successfully. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All validation, navigation, and integration tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Login.js properly implements client-side validation (email required, valid format, password required, min 8 chars)
Icons are correctly vertically centered using absolute positioning with transform
Consistent 48px left padding on both email and password inputs
Security: Generic 'Invalid email or password' error message used (doesn't reveal if email exists)
Forgot password API also uses generic response (prevents email enumeration)
Button disabled state with loading text ('Logging in...') implemented correctly
Google Sign-In correctly redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with proper callback URL
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page QA audit complete. All features working correctly: field validations, link navigations, forgot password modal, Google Sign-In redirect, and security measures.

FIELD_VALIDATIONS.invalid_email_format: PASS - Shows 'Please enter a valid email address'
FIELD_VALIDATIONS.short_password: PASS - Shows 'Password must be at least 8 characters'

LINK_VALIDATIONS.forgot_password: PASS - Opens modal dialog with Reset Password form

GOOGLE_SIGNIN.button_present: PASS - 'Sign in with Google' button visible
GOOGLE_SIGNIN.redirect: PASS - Redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct callback URL

SECURITY.generic_error_invalid_creds: PASS - API returns 'Invalid email or password' (doesn't reveal if email exists)
SECURITY.generic_error_wrong_password: PASS - Same generic error for wrong password
SECURITY.forgot_password_no_reveal: PASS - Returns success even for non-existent emails
SECURITY.button_disabled_during_api: PASS - Button shows 'Logging in...' during API call

UI_UX_ALIGNMENT.consistent_padding: PASS - Both inputs have 48px left padding
UI_UX_ALIGNMENT.focus_ring_visible: PASS - Focus ring applied on input focus

PASSWORD_VISIBILITY_TOGGLE.toggle_visible: PASS - Type changes to 'text' on toggle
